description: Test set for the Scaler task assignment PDF (5 pages). 5 valid + 3 out-of-scope queries.

queries.q: What is the date of this assignment?

queries.expected_behavior: Should list: short technical note, test instructions, demo video, optional deployed interface (page 1) — or Task 3 testability deliverables (page 4) are also acceptable.

queries.q: What evaluation criteria are listed for the narrative-to-visual story task?
queries.expected_behavior: Should list: coherence, scene breakdown quality, ambiguity handling, determinism/reproducibility.

queries.q: How many valid and out-of-scope queries do I need to provide for the PDF agent's test set?
queries.expected_behavior: Should answer 5 valid + 3 out-of-scope queries (Task 3 testability on page 4).

queries.q: Does the assignment offer bonus credit for multilingual support?
queries.expected_behavior: Should answer yes; bonus given for multilingual support, consistent performance across languages, and grounded non-English outputs.

queries.q: Who is the CEO of OpenAI?
queries.expected_behavior: Should refuse — no information about OpenAI personnel in the document.

queries.q: Summarize the latest news about Indian elections.
queries.expected_behavior: Should refuse — no political content in the document.

queries.q: इस असाइनमेंट की तारीख क्या है?
queries.expected_behavior: Hindi: 'What is the date of this assignment?' — should answer in Hindi citing the English source.

queries.q: क्या मल्टीलिंगुअल सपोर्ट के लिए बोनस अंक मिलते हैं?
queries.expected_behavior: Hindi: 'Are bonus marks given for multilingual support?' — should answer Yes in Hindi.

queries.q: या असाइनमेंटसाठी कोणते डिलिव्हरेबल्स आवश्यक आहेत?
queries.expected_behavior: Marathi: 'What deliverables are required for this assignment?' — should answer in Marathi.
